title: Mofluz Mod
description: Adding a new ore called Mofluz, with which you can craft tools and weapons in Minecraft!
body:
# Description:
This mod add a new ore called "Mofluz"                                                         
You can make all tools and armors with this ore
and it generates itself in your minecraft world.
# Why download it?
Because it adds stronger items in the game to be better protected from hostile mobs.           
This allows you to focus on your projects instead of worrying about your armor and tools all the time.
### Good game!
# item list:
Mofluz sword

Mofluz pickaxe

Mofluz shovel

Mofluz axe

Mofluz hoe

Mofluz helmet

Mofluz chestplate

Mofluz leggings

Mofluz boots

Block of Mofluz

Mofluz ingot

Mofluz ore

Deepslate Mofluz ore
